title: Senior Doctor - Cipla - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Cipla - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Cipla has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cipla:
Cipla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla!
